elements.original_description: A tiny green sprout emerges from a small brown pot on a pure white background. The sprout has two delicate leaves and looks vibrant and hopeful. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A high-quality photograph of a tiny green sprout emerging from a small brown pot on a pure white background. The sprout has two delicate leaves, vibrant and hopeful, with soft natural lighting highlighting its fresh texture. The pot is simple and earthy. Cinematic lighting with sharp focus, high resolution, and a clean, minimalist aesthetic, with pure white background, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
